title: HAPwave_bids
description: This dataset comprises intracranial EEG recordings from 8 patients during single pulse electrical stimulation of the human limbic system. The data were collected to investigate electrical stimulation-driven network interactions and advance understanding of the human connectome. Recordings include stimulation parameters (200 microsecond biphasic pulses at 6mA amplitude) and associated metadata organized according to BIDS specification.
methods_description: Intracranial EEG recordings were obtained from 8 patients at rest during single pulse electrical stimulation. Stimulation parameters: 200 microsecond duration, biphasic waveform, 6mA amplitude (4mA for subject 7 in some cases to minimize interictal responses).

funding_references.funder_name: The DERIVE Office and the Mayo Clinic Center for Biomedical Discovery

funding_references.award_title: CRCNS: Processing speed in the human connectome across the lifespan
